_comment: operon-plugin hooks. Phase 6: PreToolUse hook dispatches every tool call to mcp__operon__evaluate, which evaluates the merged guardrail Rule list (plugin -> user -> project -> workflow-embedded) against the calling Agent's (role, current_phase) projection. Decision -> hook response: deny rule -> permissionDecision=deny+reason; warn rule -> permissionDecision=ask+reason; log rule -> permissionDecision=allow (audit row written server-side); no match -> permissionDecision=allow. Hook input passes `tool_name` and the whole `tool_input` object so evaluate can run pattern detection on tool_input[detect_field] (default `command`). SessionStart bind_handle hook was removed in Phase 5 carryover #3 (mcp_tool hooks are not callable on SessionStart -- MCP context not yet up); identity is env-anchored on every tool call instead. Future phases will add Stop -> arm_nudge_timer (Phase 8) and WorktreeCreate (Phase 10).
